name: Frostreach
description: A frozen planet wrapped pole to pole in snow and old glacier ice, where pale bands of cold light hang over the drifts like halos and nothing in the white offers shelter. Its biomes range from wind-scoured snow plains and frozen pine forests to splintered glacier peaks, blue crevasse caves, and steaming geothermal pockets that never quite thaw. Travelers dig in or die; the world helps no one.
mood: Cold, exposed, and indifferent — beautiful pale light over a world that will bury you without noticing.
biome: A whole frozen planet: wind-scoured snow plains, frozen pine forests, splintered glacier peaks, blue ice caves and crevasses, frozen sea-ice, and rare steaming geothermal vents.
enemies:
FODDER (cost 1-2, swarms):
1. Frost Rat — melee swarm chip damage, very low HP. White-furred rat with frost-stiff whiskers.
2. Snow Hare — high-evasion harasser that flees when struck. Oversized twitchy white hare with strong hind legs.
3. Ice Beetle — slow crawler with a shell that cuts incoming damage. Beetle plated in frost-rimed carapace.
4. Snowfly — flying swarm that applies Chill (slow) on contact. Cluster of pale gnats with frosted wings.

STANDARD (cost 3-5):
5. Frost Wolf — pack melee that hits harder while adjacent to other wolves. Lean grey-white wolf, breath steaming.
6. Ice Spitter — ranged attacker that spits freezing globs to Slow targets. Hunched pale lizard with a bloated throat.
7. Snow Shaman — support that heals and shields allies. Fur-cloaked figure leaning on a rime-crusted staff.
8. Frost Mantis — burst single-target striker. Tall white mantis with glassy scythe arms.

ELITE (cost 6-9):
9. Frost Giant — heavy melee bruiser with knockback swings. Towering blue-skinned giant, ice matted in his beard.
10. Snow Bear — tanky frontline with a roar that taunts. Massive white bear, hide caked in snow.
11. Ice Golem — slow armored wall with very high defense. Lumbering figure built of packed ice and stone.
12. Frost Witch — ranged caster dealing AoE freeze and control. Gaunt woman in rimed furs, breath like fog.

BOSS (cost 10-15):
13. Frost Wyrm — flying boss with a cone breath that freezes a line of tiles. Long serpentine white dragon trailing frost.
14. Avalanche Troll — regenerates each turn and smashes terrain to bury and block tiles. Hulking troll caked in snow and broken rock.
15. Glacier Mammoth — enormous tank that charges in a straight line, trampling and knocking back. Vast tusked mammoth, fur hung with icicles.
16. Frost Lich — caster boss that raises frozen corpses as Frost Rats and Wolves while chilling the field. Crowned skeletal figure sheathed in clear ice.
items:
SWORDS:
1. Iron Sword (sword, common) — A plain, reliable blade with no tricks.
2. Frostbrand (sword, uncommon) — Chills on hit, slowing the target's next move.
3. Glacier Edge (sword, rare) — Heavy strikes with a chance to freeze a foe solid for a turn.

SPEARS:
4. Hunting Spear (spear, common) — Basic reach weapon for keeping enemies at arm's length.
5. Icepick Spear (spear, uncommon) — A narrow point that pierces through armor.
6. Frost Lance (spear, rare) — Long reach with a deep chill that lingers several turns.

BOWS:
7. Short Bow (bow, common) — Simple ranged weapon, light and quick.
8. Hunter's Bow (bow, uncommon) — Deals bonus damage to slowed or chilled targets.
9. Frost Bow (bow, rare) — Arrows root the struck enemy in ice, stopping their movement.

STAFFS:
10. Oak Staff (staff, common) — Fires a weak frost bolt at range.
11. Chill Staff (staff, uncommon) — Sweeps a small area with cold, slowing everything hit.
12. Blizzard Staff (staff, rare) — Calls a burst of freezing wind for heavy AoE damage.

TWO-HANDED:
13. Woodcutter's Axe (two-handed, common) — A slow, heavy swing that hits hard.
14. Avalanche Maul (two-handed, uncommon) — A crushing smash that knocks the target back.
15. Frost Greatsword (two-handed, rare) — Wide cleave that chills every enemy it carves through.
16. Snow Shovel (two-handed, uncommon) — Flat swings stagger foes, or scoop snow to blind one for a turn.
